abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Attack} by guiding your ship through a hazard or out of harm's way, add +1 and take momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by maneuvering your ship against a foe, add +1. If you score a strong hit with a 4, 5, or 6 on the action die, you may put yourself in firing position. If you do, set asisde the action die or note its value. If you or an ally @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} using the ship's weapons, preset your action die with that value. This persists until you fail to score a strong hit on that move, or until you make another move which changes your ship's position.
When you must @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} while piloting a ship, you may roll +integrity. If you do, take +1 momentum on a strong hit.
